name: optarena
description: Code-optimizing-agent benchmark: optimize HPC/ML/foundation kernels behind a fixed C-ABI; score = speedup over the sequential-C reference (correctness-gated, seeded-fuzz verified).
images: per hardware target in config.yaml images.<hw>; default cpu = agent optarena:cpu, verifier optarena:judge
firewall: separate verifier environment -- the agent image lacks the harness/hidden tests; the verifier image has them

scoring.reward: S_i = clamp(geomean speedup over sequential C, 1, c_max) if solved else 1.0, floored to 1.0 when the geometric stddev makes the win indistinguishable from noise
scoring.bundle_reward: geomean of per-kernel S_i, gated to 1.0 unless every kernel is solved
scoring.parity: the verifier reuses the same optarena judge + metric as a native run; measurement defaults come from config.yaml measurement.*

granularity.dir: microkernels bundled per directory; directories larger than max_bundle emit per-kernel; microapps always one task per app
granularity.files: each kernel's leak-free reference + C-ABI are uploaded as files under /app/<kernel>/; the prompt references container-absolute paths, not inlined benchmark text
